prompts.title: Code Review Expert
Architecture Decision Record
prompts.prompt:
Create an Architecture Decision Record (ADR) for the following technical decision. Include: Context (why this decision is needed), Decision (what was decided), Consequences (trade-offs), Alternatives Considered, and Status.

Decision: {describe the technical decision}

prompts.title: Debug Detective
API Design Review
Regex Builder
prompts.prompt:
Build a regex pattern that matches: {describe what you want to match}. Provide:
1. The regex pattern
2. Explanation of each part
3. Test cases that should match
4. Test cases that should NOT match
5. Any edge cases to be aware of

Target language: {JavaScript/Python/etc}

prompts.title: Database Schema Designer
prompts.prompt:
Design a normalized database schema for: {describe the application}. Include:
1. Entity-Relationship diagram (text format)
2. Table definitions with columns, types, constraints
3. Indexes for common queries
4. Explanation of normalization decisions
5. Sample queries for common operations

prompts.title: Test Case Generator
Refactoring Guide
Blog Post Outline
prompts.prompt:
Create a detailed blog post outline about: {topic}. Target audience: {audience}. Include:
1. SEO-optimized title options (3)
2. Meta description
3. H2/H3 heading structure
4. Key points for each section
5. Internal linking opportunities
6. Call-to-action suggestions

Tone: {professional/casual/technical}

prompts.title: Email Sequence Writer
Technical Documentation
Social Media Thread
prompts.prompt:
Create a compelling Twitter/X thread about: {topic}. Requirements:
- 8-12 tweets
- Hook tweet that stops scrolling
- Mix of insights, examples, and actionable tips
- End with a CTA
- Include suggested media/visual descriptions
- Tone: {authoritative/conversational/provocative}

prompts.title: Product Description Writer
Copywriting Formula Pack
Content Repurposer
prompts.prompt:
Take this content and repurpose it into multiple formats:

Original content:
{paste content}

Create:
1. Twitter thread (8 tweets)
2. LinkedIn post
3. Instagram caption
4. YouTube video script outline
5. Newsletter snippet
6. Reddit post

Maintain the core message while adapting tone for each platform.

prompts.title: Headline Generator
prompts.prompt:
Generate 20 headline options for: {topic/product}. Include:
- 5 curiosity-driven headlines
- 5 benefit-driven headlines
- 5 urgency-driven headlines
- 5 contrarian/unexpected headlines

Target audience: {describe}
Goal: {clicks/signups/sales}

prompts.title: Photorealistic Product Shot
prompts.prompt: {product} on a {surface material} surface, studio lighting, soft shadows, shallow depth of field, 8K, commercial photography, clean background, product photography, Canon EOS R5 --ar 4:5 --v 6

prompts.title: Character Design
prompts.prompt: Character design sheet, {character description}, multiple poses and expressions, full body front and side view, {art style} style, detailed outfit design, white background, concept art --ar 16:9 --v 6

prompts.title: Logo Design
prompts.prompt: Minimalist logo design for {brand name}, {industry}, clean vector style, {color scheme}, modern, professional, scalable, white background, graphic design --ar 1:1 --v 6

prompts.title: Social Media Banner
prompts.prompt: {theme/mood} banner image, {describe scene}, vibrant colors, modern design, abstract geometric elements, professional, social media header, clean composition --ar 3:1 --v 6

prompts.title: UI/UX Mockup
prompts.prompt: UI design mockup for {app type}, {dark/light} theme, modern interface, clean layout, {color scheme}, glassmorphism elements, mobile app screen, Dribbble style --ar 9:16 --v 6

prompts.title: Book Cover
prompts.prompt: Book cover design for '{title}', {genre} genre, {mood/atmosphere}, dramatic lighting, {style: painted/photographic/illustrated}, compelling composition, professional typography space --ar 2:3 --v 6

prompts.title: Isometric Illustration
prompts.prompt: Isometric illustration of {scene}, colorful, detailed, {style: flat/3D/pixel}, clean edges, white background, infographic style, modern design --ar 1:1 --v 6

prompts.title: Texture & Pattern
prompts.prompt: Seamless tileable pattern, {describe pattern: geometric/organic/abstract}, {color palette}, high resolution, repeating pattern, surface design, textile design --tile --ar 1:1 --v 6

prompts.title: Competitor Analysis
Business Model Canvas
Landing Page Copy
Pricing Strategy
Customer Persona Builder
prompts.prompt:
Create 3 detailed customer personas for: {product/service}.

For each persona include: Name, Age, Job title, Income, Goals, Frustrations, Preferred channels, Buying triggers, Objections, and a day-in-the-life narrative. Make them specific and actionable for marketing decisions.

prompts.title: SEO Content Strategy
Pitch Deck Outline
A/B Test Hypothesis Generator
prompts.prompt:
Generate 10 A/B test hypotheses for: {website/product page URL or description}.

For each test include:
1. Hypothesis statement (If we change X, then Y will happen, because Z)
2. Primary metric to track
3. Expected impact (low/medium/high)
4. Implementation difficulty
5. Priority score

Focus on highest-impact, lowest-effort tests first.

prompts.title: Data Cleaning Advisor
prompts.prompt:
I have a dataset with these columns: {list columns with sample values}. Help me:
1. Identify potential data quality issues
2. Suggest cleaning steps for each column
3. Write {Python/SQL} code for the cleaning pipeline
4. Flag potential biases or gaps
5. Recommend validation checks

prompts.title: SQL Query Optimizer
Dashboard Design
Excel/Sheets Formula Expert
Statistical Analysis Plan
Data Visualization Advisor
ETL Pipeline Designer
Anomaly Detection Setup
Concept Explainer
prompts.prompt:
Explain {concept} at three levels:
1. ELI5 (simple analogy)
2. Intermediate (for someone with basic {field} knowledge)
3. Expert (technical depth with nuances)

For each level, include a practical example. Then provide 5 questions I should be able to answer if I truly understand this concept.

prompts.title: Learning Roadmap
Research Paper Summarizer
prompts.prompt:
Analyze this research paper/article:

{paste abstract or key sections}

Provide:
1. One-sentence summary
2. Key findings (bullet points)
3. Methodology critique
4. Practical implications
5. Limitations acknowledged
6. How this connects to: {your field/interest}
7. 3 follow-up questions for deeper investigation

prompts.title: Socratic Learning Partner
prompts.prompt: I want to deeply understand: {topic}. Instead of explaining it to me, use the Socratic method. Ask me probing questions one at a time that will guide me to discover the key principles myself. Start with foundational questions and progressively increase complexity. If I get stuck, give a hint rather than the answer. Begin with the first question.

prompts.title: Mental Model Mapper
prompts.prompt:
Apply these mental models to analyze: {situation/decision}:
1. First Principles Thinking
2. Second-Order Effects
3. Inversion
4. Circle of Competence
5. Opportunity Cost

For each model, provide the analysis and one actionable insight. Then synthesize all perspectives into a recommended course of action.

prompts.title: Book Summary Generator
prompts.prompt:
Provide a comprehensive summary of '{book title}' by {author}:
1. Core thesis in one sentence
2. Top 10 key ideas with explanations
3. Most important quotes
4. Practical action items I can implement today
5. Criticisms and counterarguments
6. Related books to read next
7. Who should (and shouldn't) read this book

prompts.title: Interview Prep Coach
prompts.prompt:
Help me prepare for a {job title} interview at {company type}.

My background: {brief summary}
Interview type: {behavioral/technical/system design}

Provide:
1. 10 likely questions with STAR-format answer frameworks
2. 5 questions I should ask them
3. Common red flags to avoid
4. 3 ways to stand out
5. A 30-second elevator pitch draft

prompts.title: Decision Framework
prompts.prompt:
Help me make this decision: {describe decision}.

Options: {list options}
Constraints: {time, budget, etc.}
Values: {what matters most}

Analyze using:
1. Weighted pros/cons matrix
2. 10/10/10 rule (10 min, 10 months, 10 years)
3. Regret minimization
4. Expected value calculation
5. Pre-mortem analysis for top choice

Give a clear recommendation.
